text: A pilot providing pilot services shall, to the extent possible, cooperate with the master of the vessel.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 61. Compulsory Pilotage
##### § 61.010 — Cooperation

A pilot providing pilot services shall, to the extent possible, cooperate with the master of the vessel.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A pilot providing pilot services shall, to the extent possible, cooperate with the master of the vessel.
